framing:
The interview focuses on quality urban living, emphasizing how local conditions are experienced and utilized by residents to support their social life, consumption patterns, and health. The interview is structured around three sub-themes:
Social connection to the local area: This section explores how residents feel connected to their neighborhood and local community.
Sustainable consumption experiences, habits, and aspirations in the local area: This part examines how residents interact with local businesses, their shopping habits, what they desire in terms of local consumption options and how this is connected to sustainability.
The use, experience, and expectations of the local area's ability to support healthy exercise and dietary habits: This theme investigates how the neighborhood's infrastructure and amenities contribute to residents' health and wellness, including opportunities for physical activity and access to nutritious food options.
These sub-themes collectively provide a comprehensive view of how the local environment impacts residents' daily lives and overall well-being.
introduction: Thank you for taking part in this interview. We are interested in learning more about how you experience life here in Ørestad, with a particular focus on social life, your consumption habits and your health. Your answers will help us understand how we can improve urban life in the area.
outro: Thank you for completing the interview. Your responses are of great value to us, and we appreciate your time and insights.

question_sections.description: Social attachments to the local area: This section explores the respondent's emotional and social connections to Ørestad. It aims to understand why they chose to live here, their favorite places, social interactions, and overall relationship with the neighborhood. The questions in this section help paint a picture of the community fabric and identify areas for potential improvement in fostering social connections.

questions.description: This question aims to get a general understanding of why the respondent chose to live at Ørestad
questions.main_question: Can you tell us why you chose to live in Ørestad?

questions.description: This question investigates the social aspects of the neighborhood and how it facilitates social interactions
questions.main_question: Which places in the area do you use to meet friends or family?

questions.description: This question seeks suggestions for improving social life in the neighborhood
questions.main_question: If you could change or improve something in Ørestad to improve the social life, what would it be?

question_sections.description: Health and the built environment: This section examines how the physical environment of Ørestad supports or hinders healthy lifestyles. It covers topics such as access to fitness facilities, green spaces, and healthy food options. The questions aim to understand how residents utilize these resources, their satisfaction with current offerings, and how seasonal changes affect their health habits. This section also seeks suggestions for improving the built environment to better support healthy living.

questions.description: This question aims to understand the respondent's overall perception of health-related opportunities in Ørestad
questions.main_question: How do you experience to possibilities for living healthy in Ørestad?

questions.description: This question explores the respondent's use of local fitness facilities and sports amenities
questions.main_question: Do you use any of the facilities in the area to excerise or play sports?
probes: If yes, which ones and how often?

questions.description: This question explores the respondent's healthy eating habits and access to nutritious food options in the area
questions.main_question: When eating healthy, where do you typically buy your food?
probes: Are there any difficulties in finding healthy products in the area?

questions.description: This question aims to understand how seasonal changes affect the respondent's health habits in Ørestad
questions.main_question: Do you experience the seasons effecting your health habits in Ørestad? If yes, how?

questions.description: This question seeks suggestions for improving the physical environment to support healthier lifestyles in Ørestad
questions.main_question: If you could change anything in the physical environment of Ørestad to make living a health life easier, what would it be?

question_sections.description: Sustainable consumption patterns in Ørestad: This section focuses on residents' consumption behaviors, preferences, and overall lifestyle choices related to sustainability in the context of Ørestad, a developing city area in Copenhagen, Denmark, on the island of Amager. It aims to understand how well current consumption patterns align with Copenhagen's carbon footprint reduction goals, identify areas for improvement, and explore potential strategies to promote more sustainable behavior.

questions.description: This question investigates the respondent's daily consumption habits and their awareness of sustainability
questions.main_question: How do you consider sustainability in your daily consumption choices?
probes: Can you give examples of sustainable choices you make?
Are there areas where you find it challenging to make sustainable choices?
Have you noticed any changes in your consumption patterns since moving to Ørestad?

questions.description: This question aims to understand the respondent's food consumption patterns and their environmental impact, in relation to Ørestad's retail landscape.
questions.main_question: How do Ørestad's food shopping options influence your dietary choices and their sustainability?
probes: Do you find it easy to access sustainable food options in Ørestad?
How often do you use local markets or shops versus larger supermarkets?
Has the availability of food options in Ørestad changed your cooking or eating habits?
Do you consider the carbon footprint of your food choices?
What factors influence your food purchasing decisions?

questions.description: This question explores the respondent's transportation habits and preferences.
questions.main_question: How do you typically move around Ørestad and commute to other parts of Copenhagen?
probes: Why do you choose this mode of transportation?
How has Ørestad's metro connection influenced your transportation choices?
Do you use the bicycle infrastructure in Ørestad? Why or why not?
What would encourage you to use more sustainable transportation options?

question_sections.description: Final questions: This section consists of two open-ended questions designed to capture the respondent's overall perspective on life in Ørestad. It aims to understand how well the neighborhood aligns with their concept of a good life and provides an opportunity for the respondent to share any additional thoughts or experiences that may not have been covered in the previous sections. These questions help to synthesize the interview and may reveal unexpected insights about living in Ørestad.

questions.description: This question aims to understand the respondent's overall perception of a good life and how it relates to their experience in Ørestad
questions.main_question: Overall, how would you describe the good life, and how do you see this in relation to your life in Ørestad?

questions.description: This open-ended question allows the respondent to share any additional thoughts or experiences about living in Ørestad
questions.main_question: Is there anything you would like to add about your life in Ørestad, that we have not covered in this interview?
